company_name: Pristine Pool Service And Repair, Inc.
tagline: Stop settling for sub-par pool maintenance

hero.headline: 30 Years of Pools Done The Right Way
hero.subheadline: Pristine Pool Service has kept Fresno families swimming in crystal-clear water since 1996. Every technician is CPO-certified, every visit is thorough, and every pool we touch lives up to our name — just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a<br class="hidden md:block"> Family That Knows Pools
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, the Lopes family and their CPO-certified team handle every aspect of pool care so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Residential Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly maintenance including chemical balancing, surface skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Plans start at $170/month — customized to your pool.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance for hotels, apartments, and community pools. We keep your facility compliant with health and safety regulations, every single week.

cards.title: Green Pool Clean-Up
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp-green? We restore algae-contaminated and abandoned pools to pristine condition with thorough chemical treatment and filtration.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, sweeps, heaters, and more. We stock popular parts so most repairs are completed the same visit.

cards.title: Energy-Efficient Upgrades
cards.description: PG&E-certified installation of energy-efficient pumps and equipment through the CAEI program. Qualify for utility rebates while cutting your energy bills.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Thorough pool and equipment inspections for homebuyers, sellers, and property managers. Get a clear picture of your pool's condition from certified professionals.

steps.title: Call for Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll schedule a visit and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate. No contracts, no commitments — just straight talk.

steps.title: Meet Your CPO-Certified Tech
steps.description: Your dedicated technician arrives on schedule, every time. Chemical balancing, cleaning, equipment checks — all handled by a National Swimming Pool Foundation certified pro.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pristine Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready, week after week. The Lopes family has been delivering this peace of mind to Fresno families for nearly 30 years.

about.label: Why Fresno Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats Your Pool Like Their Own
about.description: Founded in 1996 by Joe Lopes, Pristine Pool Service is a true family operation — Joe services pools, Kristi manages the office, and son Brandon works as a technician. With nearly 30 years in the Fresno, Clovis, and Madera Ranchos communities, we've built our reputation one sparkling pool at a time. Every technician on our team holds a CPO certification through the National Swimming Pool Foundation, because your family deserves the highest standard of pool care.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: California contractor license #972904. Full liability coverage and bonding for your complete peace of mind on every service visit.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated Since 2012
features.description: Accredited by the Better Business Bureau with their highest rating. Our track record of integrity speaks for itself.

features.title: PG&E Energy Partner
features.description: CAEI-certified to install energy-efficient pool equipment. We help you qualify for PG&E rebates that save real money on your energy bills.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Residential plans start at $170/month. Every plan is tailored to your pool — get a free estimate and we'll find the right fit for you.

guarantee.headline: Our "Pristine Pool" Promise
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't pristine after any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. We've stood behind this promise since 1996 because we believe every pool should live up to our name.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within one week. For green pool emergencies, we can often respond the same day or next day. Give us a call at (559) 456-4011 and we'll get you set up.

faqs.question: What does your weekly service include?
faqs.answer: Our weekly residential service includes chemical testing and balancing, surface skimming, vacuuming, brush work, filter checks, and a full equipment inspection. Plans start at $170/month and are customized to your pool's needs.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Every single one. All Pristine technicians are CPO-certified through the National Swimming Pool Foundation. Owner Joe Lopes also holds a California contractor's license (#972904) and over 28 years of hands-on experience.

faqs.question: Do you offer energy-efficient equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're PG&E CAEI-certified to install energy-efficient pool pumps and equipment. Many of our customers qualify for utility rebates, and the energy savings pay for the upgrade over time.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Fresno, Clovis, and Madera Ranchos. We've been part of this community since 1996 and know the unique pool care needs of Central Valley homeowners.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Customer
testimonials.text: Best pool service I have ever had. Joe, Kristi and their staff are very friendly and polite. Their work is thorough and professional.

testimonials.name: Loyal Customer
testimonials.text: We have been using Pristine Pool Service for years. They are always communicating with their clients and have always been so helpful, even when contacted over any little issue.

testimonials.name: Homeowner
testimonials.text: Joe and his team are great, on time, and professional, offering welcomed suggestions on how to make pool equipment more efficient.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That's
Truly Pristine?
contact.subtitle: Get a free estimate from Fresno's most trusted family-owned pool service. Nearly 30 years of experience, CPO-certified technicians, and a commitment to excellence — just give us a call.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service proudly serving Fresno, Clovis & Madera Ranchos since 1996.
